description: The image displays the logo for the "Land Monitoring Service". The logo is rendered in green on a white background and features a graphic icon to the left of the text. The icon consists of an incomplete circular arc encompassing two elements: four vertical bars of varying height on the left, resembling a city skyline or data bars, and a stylized ear of wheat or grain stalk on the right. To the right of this graphic, the text "Land" appears on the first line, and "Monitoring Service" appears on the second line, both in green and left-aligned.
